channel.title: Boletim de Cyber Segurança - Técnica - Diário

item.title: Boletim de Cyber Segurança - Técnica - Diário
item.description:
🚨 Boletim de Cyber Segurança - Técnica
Visão geral:
• 0 com severidade Crítica
• 13 com severidade Alta
• 7 novas CVEs
• 5 novos advisories/exploits

────────────────────────────────────
Infraestrutura - Docker / ESX / Elastic / Grafana / Nginx / VMware / Zabbix

🚨 CVE-2026-5741 - Docker
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: Docker
Fonte: NVD
CVSS: 7.3
Resumo:
A weakness has been identified in suvarchal docker-mcp-server up to 0.1.0. The impacted element is the function stop_container/remove_container/pull_image of the file src/index.ts of the component HTTP Interface. This manipulation causes os command injection. The attack is possible to be carried out remotely. The exploit has been made available to the public and could be used for attacks. The project was informed of...
Link: https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-5741
 
🚨 Docker Flaw (CVE-2026-34040) Lets Attackers Bypass Security Controls and Take Over Hosts - eSecurity Planet
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: Docker
Fonte: Google News RSS
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
A publicação relata a vulnerabilidade CVE-2026-34040 associada a Docker. Vale consultar o link para verificar impacto, versões afetadas e orientações de correção.
Link: https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMixgFBVV95cUxQbDV3MUc2bGdIMWJOaXZheVVVZllRcE5KaWJPNU9kZ0F0SktWNzdhTGxLYlRKSzE3SEtaeEJZUFNTek1hZ1pmcnJMOGx1ZjNYYjhLTUNMQW9sRXRUcDFsOHI4d2xDSXM0dVZPclJDMl82RmtnOU03cTl4S0xQNF9ya3VBX204MmltbFZwZnROMjU4OTVsV2R6X2tEcER6UF9lUEtLM29OUzV6MC1LOHRsVVJSMkZpUW4wbUtkU2dMRzUyQkd0QkE?oc=5
 
💣 Reclaim Developer Hours through Smarter Vulnerability Prioritization with Docker and Mend.io
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: Docker
Fonte: https://www.docker.com/blog/feed/
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
We recently announced the integration between Mend.io and Docker Hardened Images (DHI) provides a seamless framework for managing container security. By automatically distinguishing between base image vulnerabilities and application-layer risks, it uses VEX statements to differentiate between exploitable vulnerabilities and non-exploitable vulnerabilities, allowing your team to prioritize what really matters.
Link: https://www.docker.com/blog/reclaim-developer-hours-through-smarter-vulnerability-prioritization-with-docker-and-mend-io/
 
📰 Grafana Patches AI Bug That Could Have Leaked User Data - Dark Reading
 
Criticidade: Média
Ferramenta: Grafana
Fonte: Google News RSS
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
A notícia aborda atualização ou correção de segurança associada a Grafana, o que pode exigir validação e aplicação no ambiente.
Link: https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMikgFBVV95cUxNV1ZZeG5jalJzQWlBdTRUVGcxLU9IRE1TaDlpYTBGQlZVU2V5YVV1QWNvQlBHWTRWSnhDc2o5Q3BDQmNlVk54Z3RaTnRJS0hWMlZhR01kQmVHYWJOMl9RMmd2NEE2UE8xcTVWQ01HR3ljM0hzRWZNWEgtanNQNEMyYUsyeTUtckQyLTFqVXhFb29wdw?oc=5
 
📰 Staying Secure: An Inside Look at Zabbix Security Advisories
 
Criticidade: Baixa
Ferramenta: Zabbix
Fonte: https://blog.zabbix.com/feed/
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
Security has always been a core priority for us at Zabbix. As part of our ongoing commitment to delivering a reliable and secure monitoring platform, we regularly publish security advisories that reflect both newly discovered vulnerabilities and the improvements we’ve made to address them. These advisories are not just a list of issues – they […]
Link: https://blog.zabbix.com/staying-secure-an-inside-look-at-zabbix-security-advisories/32831/
 
────────────────────────────────────
Segurança - Acronis / Axur / Check Point / Harmony SASE / Qualys / SentinelOne

💣 CISA orders feds to patch exploited Ivanti EPMM flaw by Sunday
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: SentinelOne
Fonte: BleepingComputer
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
government agencies four days to secure their systems against a critical-severity vulnerability in Ivanti Endpoint Manager Mobile (EPMM) that has been exploited in attacks since January.
Link: https://www.bleepingcomputer.com/news/security/cisa-orders-feds-to-patch-exploited-ivanti-epmm-flaw-by-sunday/
 
💣 Adobe Reader Zero-Day Exploited via Malicious PDFs Since December 2025
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: Qualys
Fonte: The Hacker News
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
Threat actors have been exploiting a previously unknown zero-day vulnerability in Adobe Reader using maliciously crafted PDF documents since at least December 2025. The finding, detailed by EXPMON's Haifei Li, has been described as a highly-sophisticated PDF exploit. The artifact ("Invoice540.pdf") first appeared on the VirusTotal platform on November 28, 2025.
Link: https://thehackernews.com/2026/04/adobe-reader-zero-day-exploited-via.html
 
💣 Hackers exploiting Acrobat Reader zero-day flaw since December
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: SentinelOne
Fonte: BleepingComputer
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
Attackers have been exploiting a zero-day vulnerability in Adobe Reader using maliciously crafted PDF documents since at least December.
Link: https://www.bleepingcomputer.com/news/security/hackers-exploiting-acrobat-reader-zero-day-flaw-since-december/
 
💣 Qualys warns attackers exploit flaws before disclosure - IT Brief Asia
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: Qualys
Fonte: Google News RSS
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
A publicação menciona exploração ativa, técnica ofensiva ou abuso envolvendo Qualys. Consulte o link para entender melhor o impacto e as recomendações.
Link: https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiiAFBVV95cUxNeXpMMEtrbEl3SlprUDdWM1kzeXJiemQtNUJFNjFlQzBSMDRxVWYwUlRYN0dNT3FIY1BPWVdTN0lhUDlzcFlmdkpRRU4xMlh2RjFWclNfVHk5VWVYdTJpQkszWndsaXZHZmM1eVI3RGtnM3RycHRsV1BkUm9uTHJWcHg0c1lzelJl?oc=5
 
📰 ThreatsDay Bulletin: Hybrid P2P Botnet, 13-Year-Old Apache RCE and 18 More Stories
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: Qualys
Fonte: The Hacker News
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
Another week, another batch of things that probably should've been caught sooner but weren't. This one's got some range — old vulnerabilities getting new life, a few "why was that even possible" moments, attackers leaning on platforms and tools you'd normally trust without thinking twice. Quiet escalations more than loud zero-days, but the kind that matter more in
Link: https://thehackernews.com/2026/04/threatsday-bulletin-hybrid-p2p-botnet.html
 
📰 Microsoft suspends dev accounts for high-profile open source projects
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: SentinelOne
Fonte: BleepingComputer
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
Microsoft has suspended developer accounts used to maintain multiple high-profile open-source projects without proper notification and no way to quickly reinstate them, effectively blocking them from publishing new software builds and security patches for Windows users.
Link: https://www.bleepingcomputer.com/news/microsoft/microsoft-suspends-dev-accounts-for-high-profile-open-source-projects/
 
────────────────────────────────────
Sistemas / Cloud - 1Password / Azure / Office / Ubuntu / Windows Server / WordPress

🚨 USN-8149-2: Linux kernel vulnerabilities
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: Ubuntu
Fonte: https://ubuntu.com/security/notices/rss.xml
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
Several security issues were discovered in the Linux kernel. An attacker could possibly use these to compromise the system. This update corrects flaws in the following subsystems: - Cryptographic API; - Netfilter; - Network traffic control; (CVE-2026-23060, CVE-2026-23074, CVE-2026-23111)
Link: https://ubuntu.com/security/notices/USN-8149-2
 
🚨 CVE-2025-14944 - WordPress
 
Criticidade: Média
Ferramenta: WordPress
Fonte: NVD
CVSS: 5.3
Resumo:
The Backup Migration plugin for WordPress is vulnerable to Missing Authorization in all versions up to, and including, 2.0.0. This is due to a missing capability check on the 'initializeOfflineAjax' function and lack of proper nonce verification. The endpoint only validates against hardcoded tokens which are publicly exposed in the plugin's JavaScript. This makes it possible for unauthenticated attackers to trigger t...
Link: https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2025-14944
 
🚨 CVE-2026-4065 - WordPress
 
Criticidade: Média
Ferramenta: WordPress
Fonte: NVD
CVSS: 5.4
Resumo:
The Smart Slider 3 plugin for WordPress is vulnerable to unauthorized access and modification of data due to missing capability checks on multiple wp_ajax_smart-slider3 controller actions in all versions up to, and including, 3.5.1.33. The display_admin_ajax() method does not call checkForCap() (which requires unfiltered_html capability), and several controller actions only validate the nonce (validateToken()) withou...
Link: https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-4065
 
📰 USN-8158-1: Dogtag PKI vulnerability
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: Ubuntu
Fonte: https://ubuntu.com/security/notices/rss.xml
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
Fraser Tweedale and Geetika Kapoor discovered that Dogtag PKI could renew a certificate without proper authentication. An attacker could possibly use this to repeatedly renew a compromised certificate and maintain unauthorized access to a system or resource.
Link: https://ubuntu.com/security/notices/USN-8158-1
 
📰 USN-8156-1: GDK-PixBuf vulnerability
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: Ubuntu
Fonte: https://ubuntu.com/security/notices/rss.xml
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
It was discovered that GDK-PixBuf incorrectly handled certain JPEG files. An attacker could use this issue to cause GDK-PixBuf to crash, resulting in a denial of service, or possibly execute arbitrary code.
Link: https://ubuntu.com/security/notices/USN-8156-1
 
📰 USD/INR: Range-bound outlook and vulnerability to oil prices – MUFG - Bitget
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: Office
Fonte: Google News RSS
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
A notícia está relacionada a Office no contexto de segurança da informação, com potencial relevância para monitoramento, prevenção ou resposta.
Link: https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiXkFVX3lxTE8wNU9Kc083WlY3VGNpOHZrTS1GOWVVcDFQNGRoOFpPWTZ3T25aakRWWk1PSW9WQlFsSEt4aGxLMlBXaXpRRkpNdmJleEc2QmFLeWZfS0o5TE0tQkw3eWfSAWNBVV95cUxPUjdaajlpeUJmZTVmN2RfZnU1YllTWnlKNTV0MFYwdGhaUHA0VDA1bmhCYjJWMGFoMms3bUdoQ1BRYThzRE1raTNvR2NEdGtIT3pBdUVQZHRkQXhheWtCajJmeEk?oc=5
 
────────────────────────────────────
Período: Notícias do período de 07/04/2026 até 09/04/2026.
